nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.id: loc-内格罗河-亚马孙河支流-a2458a6f
nodes.name: 内格罗河 (亚马孙河支流)
nodes.summary: 内格罗河 (亚马孙河支流)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联38种鸟类，包括肉垂鳳冠雉、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、Lettered aracari等38种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Purple-throated cotinga
nodes.summary: Purple-throated cotinga（Purple-throated cotinga，学名 Porphyrolaema porphyrolaema），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。
locations: 内格罗河 (亚马孙河支流)

nodes.name: 亞馬遜雨林
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联52种鸟类，包括白喉䳍、巴西穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等52种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马德雷德迪奥斯大区
nodes.summary: 马德雷德迪奥斯大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括Fiery-capped manakin、Purple-throated cotinga、Marble-faced bristle tyrant等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马托格罗索州
nodes.summary: 马托格罗索州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联93种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、Chaco chachalaca、蓝眼地鸠等93种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the western Amazon rainforest of South America; its range extends from southern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador and Peru and east through extreme northwestern Bolivia and into western Amazonian Brazil

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|right|Rainforest canopy in Brazil The purple-throated cotinga is found throughout western Amazonia from southern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador and Peru to the Madre de Dios region and east through extreme northwestern Bolivia and into western Amazonian Brazil. The eastern boundary of the species appears to be the lower Rio Negro and northern Mato Grosso in Brazil. The purple-throated cotinga's total range covers approximately , throughout which it occurs in patches at low population densities. In southeastern Peru only two birds were found per , a ratio which likely is true across its range. The cotinga can be found in the canopy or borders of humid forest up to in elevation, but mostly is restricted to humid forests below . It can be found in either unflooded humid forests or in várzea forests, which are seasonally flooded. It is non-migratory

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The purple-throated cotinga is not well known and appears to be naturally uncommon or rare across a widespread area; however, it is almost certainly under-reported due to its canopy lifestyle. The IUCN considers this species to be a species of Least Concern due in part to its large range. While the IUCN has not estimated the population size, it believes it is declining due to habitat loss
